why_this_is_highest: Without directive persistence future state advances faster than GitHub; ChatGPT visibility drifts.
expected_release_delta: Every directive immediately GitHub-visible; future audits deterministic.
why_other_work_rejected: Do not jump to LIVE_CHAT_CAPABILITY_GAP until persistence lock lands.

why_this_is_highest: Pantheon lacks a level-0 release certifier that deterministically judges all release phases, unknown gaps, founder-absence readiness, and current highest blocker from runtime proof.
expected_release_delta: Top-level self-judgment becomes real; future work routes through one certification queue instead of manual priority selection.
why_other_work_rejected: Point fixes without a compiler leave authority fragmented and release status non-deterministic.

why_this_is_highest: Release window is approximately one hour; authority, mission control, self-edit path, directive persistence, and public authority already exist; public quality depends on live chat, coding, eval, and API contribution now.
expected_release_delta: Public-release-ready Pantheon with customer-visible lift in conversation quality, coding usefulness, eval outcomes, and API readiness.
why_other_work_rejected: No new subsystems, frameworks, certification engines, memory architectures, cognition architectures, governance layers, or abstractions; use only existing components.
